title: Infosys Foundation launches Infosys Springboard Livelihood Program
detailed_summary: Infosys Foundation launched the Infosys Springboard Livelihood Program, a CSR initiative intended to help half a million job seekers in India gain meaningful employment by 2030. The Foundation committed over INR 200 crore for the first phase, and said over 80,000 job seekers were placed in new jobs across industries in FY25.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Foundation launched the Infosys Springboard Livelihood Program to enable half a million job seekers in India to gain meaningful employment by 2030.
